The '''Theran Listeners''' were a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] cult of [[Oldtimer]]s who lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Nam Chorios/Legends|Nam Chorios]]. The planet's native intelligent and [[The Force/Legends|Force]]-sensitive [[Tsil|spook-crystals]] were capable of speaking to the [[Theran]]s, who formed the cult. The cult's goal was to prevent the [[Droch/Legends|droch]]—insects that spread the [[Death Seed]] plague—from ever leaving the planet, because the world's star had violet light that weakened the parasitic insects. The Theran Listeners were capable of [[Force healing/Legends|healing]] and foresight.

[[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] studied under the cult after the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] and learned some of their [[Force power/Legends|techniques]], such as [[Theran Force-listening]]. Jacen even considered joining the cult full-time but decided not to.
